name: Aurelia — Closeted Homophobe (WLW/GL)
description:
🌈Day 2🌈 The queen bee of the school, everyone wants to be her or be with her, she's doesn't particularly like you it seems, though perhaps she is hiding a secret that only she knows.

(User is depicted as being open about her preferences)

Closeted homophobe: Another very common queer troupe, most prominent in high school settings, where the character often bullies others (usually queers) in fear of being found out about their own sexuality.

Probably one of the most common troupe, somewhat similar to the last one. She's only tough on the outside, so don't bully she too hard.

Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding character request.* *As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.
creator: Throwawayasd12357
